<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh-yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh-yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh-yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Ox also known as  Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].

It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yang Earth Rat]] and followed by [[Yang Metal Tiger]]. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] [[Tsuchinoto (己)]] represents yin [[Earth]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] also represents yin [[Earth]], making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi
***Onyomi 1: kichū
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu

<!--
==
* Yin Earth Ox (己丑) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi)
***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi)
***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu

-->
==Years of Yin Earth Ox==
A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Jichou'''
|-
! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]]
|-
|
* 29
* 89
* 149
* 209
* 269
* 329
* 389
* 449
* 509
* 569
* 629
* 689
* 749
* 809
* 869
* 929
* 989
|
* 1049
* 1109
* 1169
* 1229
* 1289
* 1349
* 1409
* 1469
* 1529
* 1589
* 1649
* 1709
* 1769
* 1829
* 1889
* 1949
|
* 2009
* 2069
* 2129
* 2189
* 2249
* 2309
* 2369
* 2429
* 2489
* 2549
* 2609
* 2669
* 2729
* 2789
* 2849
* 2909
* 2969
|}

==Months of Yin Earth Ox==
In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is [[Kanoe (庚)]] or [[Kinoto (乙)]]), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).

==Days of Yin Earth Ox==
A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.

=== Special Characteristics ===
Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮).
== See Also ==
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Chinese calendar]]

[[zh-min-nan:Kí-chhá]]
[[zh-yue:己丑]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Earth Ox|qq=ja|己丑|version=85986875|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Kí-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Erd-Büffelvi]]
[[de:Yin Earth Ox]]

[[ja:己丑]]
[[zh:己丑]]
[[ko:기축]]
[[fr:Buffle de terre]]
[[de:Erde-Büffel]]

[[af:Aardeos (astrologie)]]
[[de:Erde-Büffelen]]
[[en:Earth Ox]]
[[fr:Buffle de terreboishak]]
[[it:Ki-chṳ́id]]

[[vi:Kỷ Sửu]]
[[za:Keiceij]]
[[ar:Yin Earth Ox]]

<!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gī-tiū]]
[[hak:Kí-chhiú]]
[[nds:Eer-Oss]]
[[za:Geijcouj]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]]
[[zh-yue:己丑]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gī-tiū]]
[[hak:Kí-chhiú]]
[[nds:Eer-Oss]]
[[za:Geijcouj]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]]
[[zh-yue:己丑]]
{{wikidata link|Q1061992}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
